message:
Remove redundant good-first-issue workflow

This workflow is redundant with Prow's label plugin which already
supports the /good-first-issue slash command.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,29 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Good First Issue Label
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-permissions:
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  label-on-good-first-issue:
-    if: github.event.comment.body == '/good-first-issue'
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - name: Add "good first issue" label
-        uses: actions/github-script@v7
-        with:
-          script: |
-            const issue_number = context.payload.issue.number;
-            const owner = context.repo.owner;
-            const repo = context.repo.repo;
-
-            await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
-              owner,
-              repo,
-              issue_number,
-              labels: ['good first issue'],
-            });
-            console.log('Added label: good first issue');
